assertion.name: The DECREASE-excluded 'secure trials' evidence base
assertion.statement: The nine secure (non-DECREASE) randomised trials of perioperative beta-blockade meta-analysed by Bouri et al. 2014, after the DECREASE family was deemed insecure.
assertion.note: Disjoint from the DECREASE program by construction (it EXCLUDES it). Its result is the counterfactual: with the fabricated lineage removed, initiation of perioperative beta-blockade causes a 27% INCREASE in 30-day mortality — the sign flips.
